docs.text: XYZ Operations Welcome to the XYZ hub. This platform provides operational guidance, sovereign data architecture requirements, and enterprise policy frameworks. Data Architecture New documentation available regarding the SAP S/4HANA integration model and our transition away from standard departmental branches. Governance & Sovereign Stacks Ensure all project deployments comply with our local, non-vendor-locked data capabilities and Purview guidelines. Employee Training Access the SkillTape learning platform and find schedules for the upcoming official language learning circles.

docs.text:
Search Results Loading results... document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() { const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const query = urlParams.get('q'); const container = document.getElementById('search-results-container'); if (!query) { container.innerHTML = '

Please enter a keyword in the search bar above.

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Results for: ' + query + '

    '; const resultsList = document.getElementById('results-list'); // Fetch the locally compiled MkDocs search index fetch('./search_index.json') .then(response => response.json()) .then(data => { let matchCount = 0; // Loop through all documents in the site data.docs.forEach(doc => { // NEW FILTER: Skip any French documents if (doc.location.startsWith('fr/') || doc.location === 'fr') { return; } // The rest of your existing search logic stays exactly the same if ((doc.title && doc.title.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())) || (doc.text && doc.text.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()))) { matchCount++; const li = document.createElement('li'); li.className = "mrgn-bttm-lg"; const preview = doc.text.substring(0, 200).replace(/#/g, '') + '...'; const link = '../' + doc.location; li.innerHTML = `

    ${doc.title}

    ${preview}

    `; resultsList.appendChild(li); } }); if (matchCount === 0) { container.innerHTML += '

    No matching documents found.

    '; } }) .catch(err => { container.innerHTML = '

    Error loading the search index.

    '; console.error(err); }); });
docs.title: Search Results

docs.text: Bienvenue sur l'intranet de l'XYZ L'XYZ agit en tant qu'organisme de service spécial, et ce carrefour fournit des directives opérationnelles de base et des nouvelles. Dernières mises à jour Alignement du modèle de capacité de données : Nouvelle documentation disponible concernant l'intégration SAP S/4HANA. Opérations en milieu de travail : Mises à jour sur l'accès aux bureaux régionaux.

docs.text:
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() { const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const query = urlParams.get('q'); const container = document.getElementById('search-results-container'); if (!query) { container.innerHTML = '

Veuillez entrer un mot-clé dans la barre de recherche ci-dessus.

'; return; } container.innerHTML = '

Résultats pour : ' + query + '

    '; const resultsList = document.getElementById('results-list'); // FIXED: Use the absolute path to the root search index fetch('/my-intranet-prototype/search/search_index.json') .then(response => response.json()) .then(data => { let matchCount = 0; data.docs.forEach(doc => { // Skip any English documents if (!doc.location.startsWith('fr/') && doc.location !== 'fr') { return; } if ((doc.title && doc.title.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())) || (doc.text && doc.text.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()))) { matchCount++; const li = document.createElement('li'); li.className = "mrgn-bttm-lg"; const preview = doc.text.substring(0, 200).replace(/#/g, '') + '...'; // FIXED: Use absolute path for the result links const link = '/my-intranet-prototype/' + doc.location; li.innerHTML = `

    ${doc.title}

    ${preview}

    `; resultsList.appendChild(li); } }); if (matchCount === 0) { container.innerHTML += '

    Aucun document correspondant trouvé.

    '; } }) .catch(err => { container.innerHTML = '

    Erreur lors du chargement de l\'index de recherche.

    '; console.error(err); }); });
docs.title: Search
